title: Segmentation fault using a column inside of a functioncall
poc: create table tags_tmp (word varchar(265), counts integer not null);
create table tags (word varchar(265), counts integer not null, doccounts integer not null);
select word, counts, (select count(*) from sphinx_searchIndexLimit(word, 'index', 1000)) as doccounts from tags_tmp;
key_bug_features: Using a column inside of a function call
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id integer PRIMARY KEY, name varchar(100), age integer CHECK (age >= 0));
INSERT INTO users (id, name, age) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 30);
CREATE TABLE orders (order_id integer PRIMARY KEY, user_id integer REFERENCES users(id), total_amount decimal(10, 2));
INSERT INTO orders (order_id, user_id, total_amount) VALUES (101, 1, 250.75);
SELECT name, age, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE user_id = id) AS order_count FROM users;
